markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro to GrowthX's AI content service for Nerdio's marketing team.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Current State:** Nerdio's content strategy is reactive ("inside-out"), driven by internal product pushes. Production is limited to \~10 articles/month due to budget and a lack of strategic agency partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** GrowthX offers a proactive ("outside-in") strategy driven by market data and a high-volume production model (5 articles/week) to capture search whitespace.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Core Differentiator:** GrowthX uses a proprietary platform with custom AI workflows (e.g., Claude) and client-specific "artifacts" (brand voice, product docs) to ensure high-quality, on-brand content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** A follow-up call is scheduled for next week with Nerdio's DMO, Brian, and GrowthX CEO, Marcel, to discuss partnership details.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

## Topics

### Nerdio's Content Challenges

  - [**Strategic Gap:** The current strategy is reactive ("inside-out"), driven by internal product pushes rather than proactive market analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Production Bottleneck:** Current output is limited to \~10 articles/month (6 glossary, 4 partner guest posts) due to budget and a lack of strategic agency partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Team Bandwidth:** The team needs a partner to lead strategy, as they are already spread thin and lack the bandwidth to manage the current consultant.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Untapped Signals:** Nerdio is not effectively using search data to inform its broader content strategy (e.g., eBooks, campaigns).](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Proactive Strategy:** An "outside-in" approach driven by market data (search volume, difficulty) to identify and capture high-potential topics.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**High-Volume Production:** A minimum of 5 articles per week (new or refresh) to accelerate SEO signals and market authority.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**End-to-End Service:** Includes strategy, content creation, CMS publishing, and performance tracking (share of voice, conversions).](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [**Strategic Partner:** GrowthX aims to be a strategic extension of the team, freeing up Nerdio for high-value projects like eBooks and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [**Proprietary Platform:** Uses an internal platform, not off-the-shelf tools like Jasper.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Custom AI Workflows:** Leverages agentic workflows with models like Claude, which self-correct research and drafting to meet quality thresholds.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [**Client-Specific Artifacts:** Ingests client resources (style guides, product docs) to create "artifacts" that personalize AI outputs for brand voice and product accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [**Phased Partnership:**](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-Week Strategy Sprint):** Establishes the Content OS (keyword analysis, topic clusters) and publishes 5–20 articles to generate initial signals.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [**Ongoing Relationship:** Includes weekly strategy calls, a shared Slack channel, and a Looker dashboard for performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ashley:** Confirm Brian's availability for the follow-up call with Marcel next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Schedule a 1:1 call with Lane to address specific questions on process, quality, and measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Share GrowthX resources (videos, examples) with the Nerdio team.](https://fathom.video/share/sVs2cssuyU1yy_zN-kf1D7PyFrss7go5?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
